# Agent guidance

## Web output is compiled — do not edit it directly

The files under `web/serpent/`, `web/bouncer/`, and `web/galactic_defender/` are
**Emscripten build outputs**. Each `index.html` and `index.js` in those directories
is generated by compiling C source with `emcc` using `web/shell.html` as the HTML
template.

**Do not patch `web/*/index.html` or `web/*/index.js` by hand.** Any manual change
will be overwritten the next time the project is built.

### Where to make JavaScript / HTML fixes

| What you want to change | Edit this file |
|---|---|
| Page structure and markup | `web/shell.html` |
| Styles (layout, touch controls, topbar, loading screen) | `web/shell.css` |
| JavaScript (canvas scaling, touch controls, Module hooks) | `web/shell.js` |
| Shared nav bar styles (`.kiosk-bar`, `.kiosk-btn`, `.kiosk-hud`) | `web/kiosk.css` |
| Shared coin state (`getCoins`, `saveCoins`, `updateCoinsHud`) | `web/kiosk.js` |
| Kiosk / landing page | `web/index.html` |
| iOS audio unlock | `web/audio-unlock.js` |
| Game logic, rendering, audio (C side) | `games/<name>/main.c` |
| Shared C library (blip API) | `lib/blip.c` / `lib/blip.h` |

`web/shell.html` uses Emscripten's `{{{ SCRIPT }}}` placeholder where the compiled
game script is injected at build time. `kiosk.css`, `kiosk.js`, `shell.css`,
`shell.js`, and `audio-unlock.js` are referenced with `../` paths so they resolve
correctly from inside each game's subdirectory (`web/<game>/index.html`).
`kiosk.js` and `kiosk.css` are also loaded by `web/index.html` (without the `../`
prefix) to share the nav bar between the landing page and game pages.

### Rebuilding

Run `./build_web.sh` to recompile all three games and regenerate the files under
`web/`. Emscripten (`emcc`) must be on your `PATH`.
